header.title: Legal Policies
header.description: Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy, and Accessibility Statement for Murray Partners 4 Prevention.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: By accessing or using our website at https://murrayp4p.com, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

sections.title: 1. Use of Website
sections.content: You may use this site for lawful purposes only. You must not use this website in a way that violates any laws, infringes on anyone's rights, or is fraudulent or harmful.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, graphics, logos, and software on this website are the property of Murray Partners 4 Prevention or its content suppliers and are protected by intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. Disclaimers
sections.content: This website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the website will be uninterrupted or error-free.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Murray Partners 4 Prevention is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use or inability to use the website.

sections.title: 5. Links to Other Sites
sections.content: Our site may link to external sites that are not operated by us. We are not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

sections.title: 6. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Utah.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Murray Partners 4 Prevention is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

subsections.title: Personal Information
subsections.content: Such as your name, email, and phone number when voluntarily submitted via forms.

subsections.title: Non-Personal Information
subsections.content: Like browser type, pages visited, and time spent on site.

sections.title: How We Use Information
items: To improve our website and services
To send newsletters or updates if you opt-in

sections.title: Sharing Your Information
sections.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties except as required by law or to provide requested services.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to analyze website traffic and improve user experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us at support@murrayp4p.com

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: Murray Partners 4 Prevention is committed to making our website accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities.

sections.title: Our Commitment
sections.content: We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1, Level AA standards. We are continually working to enhance the accessibility and usability of our website.

sections.title: Contact for Accessibility Issues
sections.content: If you encounter any accessibility barriers or need assistance, please contact us:

footer: These policies may be updated periodically. Please check this page regularly for updates.
